summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All 8 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Preview button visible on account cards with email filter, From Email Filter field in add/edit account form, Preview button calls POST /api/accounts/{id}/sync-preview (returns expected 400 error in test env due to no IMAP config), account cards display both Subject and From filters in badge.
passed_tests: POST /api/accounts creates account with email_from_filter field
GET /api/accounts returns email_from_filter field on accounts
POST /api/accounts/{id}/sync-preview endpoint exists and validates properly
POST /api/accounts/{id}/sync-preview returns 400 for account without email_filter
Frontend: Add Account form has 'From Email Filter (optional)' field with data-testid='account-email-from-filter-input'
Frontend: Edit Account form has 'From Email Filter' field
Frontend: Account cards with email_filter show Preview, Sync, History buttons
Frontend: Account cards display both Subject and From filters in badge (e.g., 'Subject: ICICI Bank Statement | From: alerts@icicibank.com')
Frontend: Preview button calls sync-preview endpoint (400 expected in test env - no IMAP configured)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_EmailFromFilter_Account, TEST_UpdateFromFilter_Account, TEST_SyncPreview_Account, TEST_NoFilter_Account, TEST_PreviewUI_Account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified email sync preview features: (1) email_from_filter field added to Account model and CRUD endpoints - stored and returned correctly. (2) POST /api/accounts/{id}/sync-preview endpoint exists at line 1302 in server.py - validates account exists, has email_filter, and email config is set. Returns proper error structure on validation failures. In test env, IMAP connection will fail (expected). (3) _imap_connect_and_search helper at line 1248 is shared by both sync and sync-preview endpoints, uses FROM filter when email_from_filter is set. (4) Frontend Accounts.js has Preview button (data-testid='preview-account-{id}'), From Email Filter input (data-testid='account-email-from-filter-input'), and preview dialog structure. Account cards show both Subject and From filters in blue badge when set.
notes: Preview endpoint will fail IMAP connection in test env (no real email credentials) - this is expected behavior. The endpoint exists and returns proper error structure. For full preview dialog testing, real IMAP credentials would be needed.
